column2: The space smells unfamiliar. It is large, cool, and more than anything else... Dark.
As my eyes adjust, outlines come into focus. At the same time, I'm struck with an odd feeling in the back of my head.
(Something hard is pushing against my head...)
I stay on my back as I grope around with my hand.
The texture reminds me of something. I must have touched it before...
My pillow is long, with a round shape. It has a dent in the middle, a perfect fit for my head.
(Peanuts aren't supposed to be this big...)
But this texture is definitely a peanut shell. I can feel the countless narrow valleys running along its dry, hard surface.
If I focus, I can feel the prick of each and every lumpy ridge in my head even while lying down...
My unwitting shriek echoes through the large space.
Hey! You don't have to be that shocked. You look like you've seen a ghost.
S-Sorry. I didn't think anyone else was around...
That so? I was by your side the whole time though.
And there are other people here too. Maybe it was too dark for you to see them...
Did you have a nightmare or something? You let out quite a scream when you jumped up.
You looked so comfortable sleeping in that perfect bed I made for you.
It's your first time sleeping here, right? I gave you a pillow while you were asleep. I figured you'd need one.
And I had something that was just the right fit.
So? You got some good rest, right?
(So you're to blame for that peanut pillow!)
Hm? Wait, what's got you grinding your teeth?
Nah... Don't answer. I already know. You're anxious, right? Since you're so tiny all of a sudden.
And Saeko just goes off who knows where. She told you to wait here too, right?
This is just a desk drawer, y'know. Though it looks like a huge arena to us.
Normally, you'd put textbooks and pencil cases in here... So that means we're smaller than that.
To tell you the truth, I'm new here myself too. I only got here yesterday, so I understand how you feel.
Though getting a peek at how a cute girl lives is pretty exciting for me...
Anyway. We're both new, so let's get along.  In a weird place like this, girls should stick together.
My name's Moko. How about you?
I'm Rin. And, uh, nice to meet you...

column1: # 日本語と会話の流れ変わってるので注意（日本語の命令2つぶんの検証を無視する）

column2: I don't think a cute nickname like that fits me...
Wait a second. Um, are you actually a...
Moko, did you take the peanut?
Ah... Sorry, there's something I forgot to tell you. Could you come over here for a moment?
Dang. From the tone of his voice...
I'm pretty sure I'm gonna get a scolding.
Hey, Rin. Could you help me out a bit?
I feel a bit scared, so I'm gonna hide in a corner. Could you get everyone's attention away from me?

You're going to hide?
And how am I supposed to get people's attention?
Easy. Just talk to everyone. Introduce yourself to people and keep their eyes off me.
Time for me to hide now! I'm counting on you!
Moko finishes speaking as quickly as she started...
...and disappears into the darkness with a dash.
(She really went and hid herself... I have no idea where she ran off to.)
(But now, I can feel other people staring at me. There really are people other than Moko here.)
Moko's asked me to talk to other people to keep her safe while she's hidden. I'm scared, but I'll give it a try. I can talk to everyone by selecting them.
(This is the voice of the man who spoke to Moko earlier!)
(I don't know what he's like, but Moko was afraid he might be angry.)
E-Er, it's nice to meet you. Um, w-would you mind if I talked to you for a little while?
Of course not. Why are you acting all stiff?
Ahaha, are you feeling nervous? Don't worry, you can relax. Take a few deep breaths.

Are you feeling a bit calmer now?
Want to do another cycle?

I think I'm fine.
I do feel a bit calmer...
Great to hear. Your face looks less pale too.

Wait, I haven't introduced myself. My name's Taki.
Nice to meet you, Rin.
It's n-nice to meet you too.

(Wait, why does Taki know my name?
And same with Chio.)
(Wait, why does Taki know my name?)
Ah, you're wondering how I know your name.

It's nothing special.
Saeko told us before you came here.
She said someone named Rin was coming, so we should be nice to you. She also let us know the rules.
(That makes introductions easier. But what are the rules Saeko told him?)
Ah. You want to know what the rules are, don't you?
I'll explain after this. I wanted to tell Moko too, but...
(So that's why he called out to Moko earlier.)
Exactly. I was going to tell her, but it looks like she thought I was angry, so she ran off to hide.

(Makes sense... But wait.
He seems nicer than I thought, which is good...)

(But it's like he's reading everything on my mind.
It's nice not having to talk, but it's a bit scary.)
Ahaha, and now you're afraid because you think I'm reading your mind?

Ahaha... It's fine, I took it too far.
I'm sorry for frightening you.
Don't worry. I'm not a psychic or anything. I'm just slightly more perceptive of others than most.
I might have wanted to surprise you a little too. I'll try to keep it to myself in the future. You can relax.
(He'll keep it to himself? But that means he really is reading my mind, right?)
Taki just smiles widely without saying another word.
A woman is slumped against the wall. Her face is tilted down and looks exhausted.
The woman's eyes flash wide open once she hears my voice.
A quiet voice slips out from her lips.
...Ah, sorry. I just happened to know your name. Like, I just happened to see your face...and...um...
Your face just looks like it belongs to a Rin. Yeah...
Anyway, I should introduce myself. Right. Introductions. Since it's the first time we've met. Yup...

Oh! I just thought of something fun.
Hey, Rin, do you know my name?
Huh? Well... This is the first time we've met. There's no way for me to know.
Right, right, of course. Ha ha...ha...
But just give it a guess. Anything's fine. Just say the first female name that comes to mind.
A-Anything's fine, really... Doesn't anything come up in your subconsciousness?
No, sorry... Nothing comes up. I've lost my memories, so I don't remember anyone.
(Why does she look happy about that?)

In that case, I'll start over.
My name's Chio. Nice to meet you, Rin.
Right... It's nice to meet you too.
But you really couldn't think of even one girl's name when asked?

Oh, don't mind me! I-I'm just talking to myself.
Forget what I said just now!
(I don't think I can forget that word that easily...)
(I'm finally done introducing myself to those two.)
(What should I do now? Moko told me to get their attention.)
Why are you all shocked again?!
S-Sorry. I didn't see where you came out from.

I was just lying on the ground quietly. With how dark
it is, that's all I needed to do to hide.

So, was anyone angry?
Especially him... The young hottie.
A hottie, hm? Thank you for the praise. Hearing that from a cute girl like you makes me blush.
(That's an even stronger reaction than mine...)

Ahaha, what a great response.
Moko, you were worried I was angry, weren't you?
It's fine, I'm not angry. It's not like you've done anything wrong, right?
Then there's nothing to worry about, since there's nothing for me to get angry about.
I only came here to tell you two something.
You know where we are, don't you?
Yup. Look around. You can see the things she uses in her daily life.
While everything is larger than us, these are all Saeko's personal things.
From the water essential to our survival, to the iPod for our entertainment, everything was left here for us by Saeko.
Ooh... So we're surrounded by the personal things of a pretty girl.
Maybe I'll go sniff that hair tie after...
Huh? Why are you asking me?
Because that's what the rules say.
We'll have trouble with how to divide the things in the drawer fairly if people use them however they want.
That means somebody has to be in charge... And Saeko says that starting today, you're our supervisor.
From now on, only you can touch these items directly, Rin.
If Moko or I want anything, we have to ask you first.

You must be Saeko's favorite now...
Since you're cute.

Well, I think you'll be a fine supervisor.
You seem quite kind.

And with that memory loss of yours...
Saeko can trust you. That's a bonus for you.
Anyhow, it's time for your first job. Just so you know, supervising is tough! It might sound cool, but all it means is that you have to do a lot of menial tasks.
And here is your first task. Bring me a top.

Yes, a top. You know, that toy that spins.
They're rather common.

There should be one somewhere in this room. Bring it
to me. I'm sure you'll find it in no time.

It seems like I'm this drawer's supervisor now.
For my first job, I have to bring Taki a top.

(Drag and drop to give a character an item.)
Um... Did you really mean to give this to me? This doesn't make me happy at all.

Taki's the one who wanted an item!
I should be more careful next time...
I'm happy you got me a present, but you probably meant to give this to someone else.

Taki's the one who wanted an item!
I should be more careful next time...
I appreciate it, but I'm looking for a top.
Let's take a breather and try again from the top. Relax. Nobody gets everything perfect right away.
Um... Why did you need a top?
Well, part of it was that I just wanted to see you do your first job...

But I also like to spin this top when I have the time.
You could call it a hobby of mine.
(What a sad hobby... Like one an old man would have...)
...Sometimes, I curse these senses of mine.
But a spin of the top should fix that... Go!
Taki throws the top with a shout. The top comes off the string and shoots out...
And it falls. With a thump.

(Maybe his hand slipped...
I'll pretend I didn't see that.)

I guess I'm not...not hungry...
But I don't usually eat that much.

An empty stomach is no good.
Don't you think so, Rin?
We're agreed then! Rin, your next task is to give Moko something to eat. Make sure she eats!
(Wow, what a blatant change in subject...)
I should give Moko something to eat. Like Taki says, an empty stomach's no good. Plus, Taki seems to really want me to do this...
You could tell I wasn't that hungry? I'm happier getting something that isn't food.
You can't let your stomach stay empty.
Rin, make sure to give Moko food this time.
Y-You have to give the food to Moko! You must!
...If that's your decision, I'll accept it.
Thank you, Rin. I'm sure it was a hard decision... You've given it your all.
M-Maybe I got something wrong! Let me redo that!
Aren't you getting something mixed up? You're supposed to be giving food to Moko.
(But why are you staring at me so intensely?)

So this is the peanut in question...
Thank you, Rin.

This shell is in the way...
HyaaaAAH!
With a powerful yell, Moko presses down on the peanut. The shell cracks, revealing its soft interior.
Wow! Moko, you're strong. That shell was so hard...
You think so? I'm not actually that good with sports. Maybe because I'm always carrying heavy books at events.
...But this peanut is really huge. Why don't we split it and eat it together?
No, it's fine. You can eat it by yourself.

You said you were hungry. Make sure to eat all of it
by yourself. Understood?

Moko seems defeated somehow as she starts eating
the peanut. Each bite is tiny, like a squirrel eating a berry.

Maybe it is yummier than Moko expected...
She keeps munching down with her small mouth.
Th-There! Thank you, Moko. See you!
(He had an odd expression on his face just now...)

Hey, Rin... There's nothing to do.
Don't just stand there--chat with me.

What did you talk to the others about?
I'm new, so I don't know much about them.

Taki is really perceptive.
He guessed everything I was thinking.

Chio...seems to be hiding something.
She was mumbling some weird stuff.
Like how I must be a vir... A vir...
That's an awful thing to say to somebody you just met, right?
No, wait. That's not the problem.
Despite how you look, you said a cute nickname doesn't fit you, and your hoodie and jeans are androgynous...

I don't know how Chio saw it...
But the evidence lines up.
All we need to do is actually verify it...
Sorry, just let me check something.

Moko swiftly bends down and takes a step toward me.
Her hand gets closer to me by the second.

Then, her hand touches me--
A very important part of me.
Her eyes flash open behind her glasses. She shouts out like an explorer who's found the fabled treasure on the treasure map.

Aaahahahahaha! I'm sorry for suddenly touching you
like that. I just had to check.
Hey, Rin. Have you heard of the term otokonoko?
A term used in some subcultures for someone who looks just like a girl but has that special extra body part between their legs.

Seeing you, I just had to check...
And I was right on the money!
Of course I am! This place is amazing. A girl with boobs that are way too big and a revealing outfit, and an honest-to-God otokonoko...

This is a treasure trove of sexy cuteness overload!
It's too much. No, it's beyond that...
Um, when you say the girl with big boobs...

I mean Saeko, obviously.
You must've thought the same thing.
E-Er... So much was happening that I really wasn't looking.
Don't try to play innocent. They're huge! How could you not even have caught a glance?
...That thing between your legs isn't just for show, is it?
Before coming here, I was at a friend's to help on a draft. A super sexy one written for a doujin event.
It was a late-night deadline and it took a long time to finish. The last train was gone already, so I had to walk home.
While walking, I saw a black-haired girl walking from the other direction... The moment she passed by, all I could think about was how gorgeous she was.
But as I watched her walk away, I suddenly lost my footing... And then my perspective of the world had gone all wrong.
When I woke up, I was in this room.
I was shocked at first, of course... But I was really happy when I found out that girl had helped me.
I do want to return to my original size...
But being in a young woman's room and having that gorgeous young woman with her big boobs and black hair take care of me every day? I'm looking forward to it.
You sound like an old man.

Ahaha, people tell me that a lot.
And I think it myself too.
But somebody like me has no way of acting cute anyway, so I've completely given up on that.
Maybe a dictionary definition of otokonoko like you wouldn't understand how I feel...
Hey, how do your muscles look? Like your neck muscles. Can I slip my hand inside your hoodie?
Hey, why are you running away?

Just let me touch it a little!
It's not like that'll use it up or anything!
Just as Moko's body approaches mine again...
A low, muffled vibration reverberates from a distance.
The shaking and loud rumble of the ground do feel like an earthquake, but...
With each tremor, the sound and shaking grow stronger...
As if something enormous is approaching.
Why is it shaking so much? I can't stand!
Everything's fine! That's just Saeko coming. She must be back from university!
The roar and vibration of the ground grow even stronger.
Along with the giant footsteps, there is the regular sound of breathing and fabric against fabric... And unusually cheerful humming that cuts through the air.
But if this is just Saeko coming back...
Why do you look so terrified?
After another few seconds of silence, the ground once more begins to shudder.
I fall to the ground, unable to stay standing.
Next, I hear the creak of something moving.
Then, a tremendous commotion that shakes the whole room...
...as the room we're in--the second drawer of a desk--is pried open by Saeko's fingers.

column1: # 注意: ここから文字が大きくなり、1行あたり50文字になります

column2:
Hello, cute little people.
Did you get along while I was away?
My fifth lecture ran longer than usual, and I'm a little peckish.

Could I have another one of you today?
As a treat.
Saeko's hand comes down into the drawer.
Her unthinkably large fingers fill our vision.
They wander for just a moment, as if carefully making a decision...

And then, they stop.
Right in front of Moko's body.
Her giant fingers pluck Moko's tiny body...
...and carry her up into the sky.
Hey! Let go of me, p-please--

Teehee.
I can feel her squirming in my stomach...
Excellent work for your first job, Rin...
You fed that little person as the supervisor, didn't you?

That's what made her more appealing
and delicious.
I think you did quite well for your first time.
I-I didn't hear anything about that...

I told you to explain everything to Rin,
didn't I?

Yes, but... If he found out everything
right away...

Farewell.
Your duty is done, ex-supervisor.

...Hmph.
My fingers are a little dirty.
Well, now you know how things are.
